name: French Apple Dessert
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Tart apples; peeled and thinly sliced
3 Egg whites or 1/2 cup Cholesterol-free egg product
1/4 cup Bisquick reduced fat baking mix
1 cup Bisquick reduced fat baking mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Prepare the streusel and set aside. Spread the apples in the dish.
2. In a blender, beat the remaining ingredients on high speed for 15 seconds. With a hand mixer or wire whisk, beat until smooth. Pour over the apples.
3. Sprinkle with streusel. Bake for about 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool for at least 10 minutes before serving. Serves approximately 12-15.
Nutritional Info: (per serving) 280 calories, 4g protein, 46g carbohydrate, 9g fat, 270mg sodium, -0- cholesterol, 2g saturated fat
Source: Eating Smart with Bisquick Baking Mix (Reduced Fat)
